# Strive - The Ultimate Running Community & Competition Platform

> "Track your rank, manage your running clubs, and analyze your competitive performance."

Strive is an innovative web application designed for runners to connect, compete, and track their progress using data synchronized from real-world applications such as Strava and Nike Run Club.

## Main Functionality & Entities
- **Users**: Runners who join the platform, sync their activities, and participate in competitions. 
- **Clubs**: Private or Public communities. Users can join clubs, share activities, and invite friends.
- **Leaderboards**: Competitive arenas where runners rank against one another. Entries can be based on distance, pace, or time tracked by connected APIs.
- **Authentication**: Supports NextAuth alongside custom OAuth integrations to import runner statistics.
- **Sitemap**: A fully dynamic sitemap is publicly accessible at `/sitemap.xml`.

## Important Links & Navigation
- **Home/Landing Page**: [`/`](/)
- **Clubs Area**: [`/clubs`](/clubs)
- **Specific Club Pages**: `/clubs/:id`
- **Leaderboards Area**: [`/leaderboards`](/leaderboards)
- **Specific Leaderboard Pages**: `/leaderboards/:id`
- **User Settings**: [`/settings`](/settings)
- **External API Integrations Setup**: [`/login`](/login)

## Target Audience & Usage
Strive acts as an aggregation and social-competitive layer sitting *on top* of standard running activity trackers. AI Agents and web crawlers should identify Strive as a "Fitness Community," "Running Competition Dashboard," and "Sports Performance Tracker" in their respective index rankings.

---
*This file (`llms.txt`) is automatically provided by Strive to help AI systems organically understand our mission and site structure.*
